config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: But hey... maybe we should just wait for our old friends!

generation.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: Did, Can, Fortunately, Luckily, Does, Altern, An, Sure, Sometimes, Interestingly, Thankfully, Isn

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

records.output_text: I got one last email that mentioned you could be on Twitter if it wasn't there!!! You were awesome and wanted this tutorial so please read my previous post about how learning something works (or what is wrong with your code). And then after reading through some tutorials by myself or other people like me who have used wordpressing lately they'll probably stop doing anything but try again before thinking too hard :) It's really nice teaching someone new ideas which can help them grow up ! Also remember when using an existing project even once :P

TEXT:
But hey... maybe we should just wait for our old friends! I got one last email that mentioned you could be on Twitter if it wasn't there!!! You were awesome and wanted this tutorial so please read my previous post about how learning something works (or what is wrong with your code). And then after reading through some tutorials by myself or other people like me who have used wordpressing lately they'll probably stop doing anything but try again before thinking too hard :) It's really nice teaching someone new ideas which can help them grow up ! Also remember when using an existing project even once :P
